data.name: 為你臣服
data.detailed_description:
◆特色系統


◇在環境設定裡能打開全CG模式-自由瀏覽HCG
◇無壓力操作設計-快速的文字跳轉系統

◆故事


「我有辦法滿足你需要的性幻想，但在情境中我不會將我身體任何部位插入你的體內。」
「今天我會帶你體驗真正的調教，結束後如果你覺得滿意，並且能夠信任我，我會協助你治療你的障礙。」
「如果你能接受就脫下外套，跪下來親吻我的腳，或者換上衣服回家。」

「記住，當你跪下親吻我的腳，遊戲就開始了。」

我低頭盯著那雙剛穿著皮鞋奔波在外的腳，現在還套著黑色的襪子，可想而知大概會有怎樣的味道。

我閉上了眼，做出了選擇──

◆玩法


遊戲為第一人稱視角，玩家將扮演李凌，透過文字選項逐步發展李凌與周淳的感情線。

data.short_description: 因為一場意外而導致身體出現狀況的李凌，在學長的建議與幫助下進入了高級酒店隱密的俱樂部──雪藏，在那裡「帝王─周淳」的一場公開SM調教的表演改變了他的人生，曾經排斥SM的李凌在自我掙扎及慾望中不斷做出抉擇，最終他將會......
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 泰文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Sub for You
data.detailed_description:
◆Features


◇Full CG mode can be opened in the environment setting to browse HCGs freely
◇Stress-free operation--fast text skipping system

◆Story


‘I can fulfill your sexual fantasies, but I will not penetrate you with any part of my body during this game.’
‘Today I will take you through a real tutelage, and when it is over, if you are satisfied and can trust me, I will help you to heal your disorder.’
‘If you are comfortable with that, take off your jacket, get down on your knees and kiss my feet. Or get dressed and go home.’
‘Remember, the game starts once you get down on your knees and kiss my feet.’

I stared down at the feet that had just been running around in leather shoes, now covered in black socks. I could imagine how they might taste.

I closed my eyes and made my choice--

◆Gameplay Instructions


A POV game, with the player taking on the role of Li Ling and gradually developing the relationship between Li Ling and Zhou Chun by making choices throughout the texts.

data.short_description: After an accident, Li Ling suffered from some physical damages. With the advice and help of his senior, Li Ling entered the hidden club of a high-end hotel--Hidden, where a public BDSM performance by ‘Emperor—Zhou Chun’ changed his life. Once reluctant about BDSM, Li Ling found himself struggling between his ego and desires.
data.supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, English, Thai, Simplified Chinese
